decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_34th-st-busway, which is the correct and only registry record for the 34th Street corridor in Manhattan. The source 120507_brt_cb6_34th_street is already registered under that record, and the alias corridor_34th-st-manhattan-2012 already exists. The observation's broader limits (12th Ave to 1st Ave) reflect the study area shown in the source; the registry record captures this same transitway project. No different registry record to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The street is highlighted in yellow from Twelfth Ave to Lexington Ave, and in red from Lexington Ave to First Ave
